description.value: Often elaborate devices of ink-stained brass and vat-grown or artificial quills, these devices allow a user to copy text or transcribe speech with impressive speed and accuracy. Many scribes carry portable units, suitable for recording interrogation sessions or xenos translations. A character with a relevant Trade skill can use it to gain a +10 bonus to tests involving that skill when recording data.
description.summary: A character with a relevant Trade skill can use an auto quill to gain a +10 bonus to tests involving that skill when recording data.

system.effect: A character with a relevant Trade skill can use an auto quill to gain a +10 bonus to tests involving that skill when recording data.
